title: The "Polish & Performance" Update
changes: NEW: Added visible prev/next navigation arrows in the screenshot lightbox for mobile devices.
NEW: Screenshot thumbnails now preview in the submission form so you can verify images before submitting.
NEW: Submission form drafts are now auto-saved — switching apps or closing won't lose your progress.
IMP: Scroll-to-top button now responds instantly instead of using slow smooth scroll animation.
IMP: Scroll event listener is now debounced via requestAnimationFrame, reducing unnecessary re-renders.
IMP: Settings modal chunk is preloaded after initial render, eliminating the delay when opening Settings on Android.
IMP: App data loading starts immediately on launch instead of waiting 500ms, reducing post-splash blank screen time.
IMP: Scroll-to-top button repositioned higher to avoid overlap with 3-button navigation bars.
IMP: Variant picker is now scrollable when many architecture options are available.
FIX: Fixed screenshot lightbox swipe transitions failing on some devices by adding a timeout fallback for CSS transitionend events.
FIX: Fixed duplicate category filter tabs (e.g. 'utility' vs 'Utility') by normalizing categories to title-case in the data worker.
FIX: Fixed duplicate architecture entries (e.g. multiple 'Universal') in the variant picker by deduplicating by arch name.
FIX: Bumped Android versionCode to 5 and versionName to 1.2.4 for correct app info display after installation.

title: The "Multi-Forge" Update
changes: NEW: Added option to ignore app updates for 1 week, until next version, or never.
NEW: Added a button in Developer Options to close it without any resetting.
NEW: Full support for Codeberg and GitLab repositories with dynamic 'View on' buttons.
IMP: Implemented remote size fetching for GitLab assets using streamed GET requests.
IMP: Enhanced GitLab asset discovery to support custom attachment names (e.g. 'APK').
IMP: App detection engine now merges scan results instead of replacing the full map, preventing apps from flickering to 'not installed' during transient scan failures.
IMP: Download polling interval changed from 800ms to 1500ms for better CPU and battery efficiency.
IMP: Download completion handler now reads fresh store state, eliminating stale closure issues on rapid sequential downloads.
IMP: Bumped store version to v1.2.3.

FIX: Fixed critical bug where Orion showed apps as 'Installed' even when the user cancelled the native installer. Optimistic install marking removed for standard installs; verification loop now handles real detection.
FIX: Fixed wrong Codeberg logo on App Detail 'View on' button — replaced incorrect inline SVG with the official Codeberg logo.
FIX: Fixed 'Ignore Update' preferences not surviving app restarts (ignoredUpdates was missing from persistent storage config).
FIX: Fixed notification tap failing to open the correct app due to stale data closure capturing the initial empty app list.
FIX: Fixed tab hiding guard allowing all platform tabs to be hidden, leaving the user with no browsable content.
FIX: Fixed batch cleanup clearing all pending entries even when individual file deletions failed, preventing data loss on partial cleanup failures.
FIX: Fixed isMounted ref not being cleared on native platform unmount, causing potential state updates on unmounted components.
FIX: Fixed version parser incorrectly splitting plain build codes (e.g. '123' becoming '1.2.3'), now falls through to date-based fallback.
FIX: Removed legacy String.prototype.hashCode polyfill from AppDetail that was modifying the global prototype unnecessarily.

title: Performance & Infrastructure Update
changes: NEW: Added Release Notes history button in Developer Menu.
IMP: Upgraded build environment to Gradle 8.2.1 and Java 17.
IMP: Enhanced VPN/AdBlock detection feedback in Donation Hub.
IMP: Implemented debounced worker filtering for smoother search typing.
IMP: Throttled download polling interval to 1500ms for better CPU/Battery efficiency.
IMP: Added manual Vite chunking for vendor and capacitor libraries to speed up initial load.
IMP: Memoized global modal state and stabilized key hook references in App.tsx.
FIX: Resolved Unity Ads plugin SDK version warnings.
FIX: Notification tap now opens the correct app (stale closure fix).
FIX: Version comparison now correctly handles prerelease tags (e.g. beta.1).
FIX: File cleanup only forgets successfully deleted files, preventing data loss on failure.
FIX: Download polling no longer uses stale callback references.
FIX: Auto-update no longer re-triggers downloads for already-queued apps.
FIX: isMounted ref is now properly cleared on native platform unmount.
FIX: Removed redundant condition in verification loop.
FIX: Platform tab visibility guard now correctly prevents hiding all tabs.
FIX: Build code versions no longer incorrectly split into dotted format.
FIX: Haptic feedback only triggers on native platforms, preventing web errors.
